preserve exactly)\",\n187\t\t\t\tvalidateHeaders: []string{\"X-Amz-SignedHeaders\"},\n188\t\t\t},\n189\t\t\t{\n190\t\t\t\tname: \"X-Amz-Content-Sha256 header - 64-character special characters\",\n203\t\t\t\tvalidateHeaders: []string{\"X-Amz-Security-Token\"},\n204\t\t\t},\n205\t\t\t{\n206\t\t\t\tname: \"X-Amz-Credential - historical date\",\n207\t\t\t\theaders: (2013)\",\n211\t\t\t\tvalidateHeaders: []string{\"X-Amz-Credential\"},\n212\t\t\t},\n213\t\t\t{\n214\t\t\t\tname: \"X-Amz-Credential - future date\",\n215\t\t\t\theaders: map[string]string{\n216\t\t\t\t\t\"X-Amz-Credential\": \"AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE/20300101/us-east-1/s3/aws4_request\",\n217\t\t\t\t},\n218\t\t\t\tdescription:     \"Credential with future date (2030)\",\n219\t\t\t\tvalidateHeaders: []string{\"X-Amz-Credential\"},\n220\t\t\t},\n221\t\t\t{\n222\t\t\t\tname: \"All headers with maximum values\",\n223\t\t\t\theaders: \"content-type;content-length;host;x-amz-date;x-amz-content-sha256;x-amz-security-token;x-amz-user-agent;x-amz-storage-class\",\n229\t\t\t\t},\n230\t\t\t\tdescription:     \"All headers with maximum/edge case values\",\n231\t\t\t\tvalidateHeaders: []string{\"X-Amz-Content-Sha256\", \"X-Amz-Security-Token\", \"X-Amz-Algorithm\", \"X-Amz-Credential\", \"X-Amz-SignedHeaders\"},\n232\t\t\t},\n233\t\t}\n234\t\n235\t\tt.Log(\"Testing S3-Specific Headers Preservation\")\n236\t\tt.Log(\"This test verifies that S3 headers are received intact without modification or corruption.\")\n237\t\tt.Log(\"\")\n238\t\n239\t\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n240\t\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n241\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Testing: %s\", tc.description)\n242\t\n243\t\t\t\t// Create request with the S3 headers\n244\t\t\t\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test-bucket/test-key\", nil)\n245\t\n246\t\t\t\t// Set all the test headers\n247\t\t\t\tfor headerName, headerValue := range tc.headers {\n248\t\t\t\t\treq.Header.Set(headerName, headerValue)\n249\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Setting %s: %s\", headerName, truncateForLog(headerValue))\n250\t\t\t\t}\n251\t\n252\t\t\t\t// Store the original headers for comparison\n253\t\t\t\toriginalHeaders := make(map[string]string)\n254\t\t\t\tfor _, headerName := range tc.validateHeaders {\n255\t\t\t\t\tif value := req.Header.Get(headerName); value != \"\" {\n256\t\t\t\t\t\toriginalHeaders[headerName] = value\n257\t\t\t\t\t}\n258\t\t\t\t}\n259\t\n260\t\t\t\t// Create a custom response recorder that captures the request\n261\t\t\t\tcapturedHeaders := make(map[string]string)\n262\t\t\t\tvar headersCaptured bool\n263\t\n264\t\t\t\t// Wrap the handler to capture the S3 headers as ARMOR receives them\n265\t\t\t\twrappedHandler := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n266\t\t\t\t\t// Capture all the S3 headers as ARMOR receives them\n267\t\t\t\t\tfor _, headerName := range tc.validateHeaders {\n268\t\t\t\t\t\tif value := r.Header.Get(headerName); value != \"\" {\n269\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcapturedHeaders[headerName] = value\n270\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n271\t\t\t\t\t}\n272\t\t\t\t\theadersCaptured = true\n273\t\n274\t\t\t\t\t// Call the original handler\n275\t\t\t\t\thandler.ServeHTTP(w, r)\n276\t\t\t\t})\n277\t\n278\t\t\t\t// Create response recorder\n279\t\t\t\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n280\t\n281\t\t\t\t// Serve the request through our wrapped handler\n282\t\t\t\twrappedHandler.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n283\t\n284\t\t\t\t// Verify we captured the S3 headers\n285\t\t\t\tif !headersCaptured {\n286\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to capture S3 headers from request\")\n287\t\t\t\t\treturn\n288\t\t\t\t}\n289\t\n290\t\t\t\t// Verify each captured header matches the original exactly (byte-for-byte)\n291\t\t\t\tallMatched := true\n292\t\t\t\tfor _, headerName := range tc.validateHeaders {\n293\t\t\t\t\toriginalValue, originalExists := originalHeaders[headerName]\n294\t\t\t\t\tcapturedValue, capturedExists := capturedHeaders[headerName]\n295\t\n296\t\t\t\t\tif !originalExists {\n297\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Original header %s was not set\", headerName)\n298\t\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n299\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n300\t\t\t\t\t}\n301\t\n302\t\t\t\t\tif !capturedExists {\n303\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Captured header %s is missing\", headerName)\n304\t\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n305\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n306\t\t\t\t\t}\n307\t\n308\t\t\t\t\tif capturedValue != originalValue {\n309\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"%s header was modified during passthrough!\", headerName)\n310\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Original length: %d\", len(originalValue))\n311\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Captured length: %d\", len(capturedValue))\n312\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Original:  %q\", originalValue)\n313\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Captured: %q\", capturedValue)\n314\t\n315\t\t\t\t\t\t// Find the first difference\n316\t\t\t\t\t\tminLen := len(originalValue)\n317\t\t\t\t\t\tif len(capturedValue) < minLen {\n318\t\t\t\t\t\t\tminLen = len(capturedValue)\n319\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n320\t\t\t\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < minLen; i++ {\n321\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif originalValue[i] != capturedValue[i] {\n322\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"First difference at byte %d: original[%d]=%c (0x%02x), captured[%d]=%c (0x%02x)\",\n323\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ti, i, originalValue[i], originalValue[i],\n324\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ti, capturedValue[i], capturedValue[i])\n325\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n326\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n327\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n328\t\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n329\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n330\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ %s preserved exactly (length: %d bytes)\", headerName, len(capturedValue))\n331\t\t\t\t\t}\n332\t\t\t\t}\n333\t\n334\t\t\t\tif allMatched {\n335\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ All S3 headers passed through intact (byte-for-byte match)\")\n336\t\t\t\t} else {\n337\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Some S3 headers were modified during passthrough\")\n338\t\t\t\t}\n339\t\t\t\tt.Log(\"\")\n340\t\t\t})\n341\t\t}\n342\t\n343\t\tt.Log(\"✓ S3-specific headers preservation test completed\")\n344\t}\n345\t\n346\t// tc.validateHeaders {\n\t\t\t\t\tif value := r.Header.Get(headerName); value != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcapturedHeaders[headerName] = value\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\theadersCaptured = true\n\n\t\t\t\t// Call the original handler\n\t\t\t\thandler.ServeHTTP(w, r)\n\t\t\t})\n\n\t\t\t// Create response recorder\n\t\t\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\t\t\t// Serve the request through our wrapped handler\n\t\t\twrappedHandler.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\t\t\t// Verify we captured the S3 headers\n\t\t\tif !headersCaptured {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to capture S3 headers from request\")\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify each captured header matches the original exactly (byte-for-byte)\n\t\t\tallMatched := true\n\t\t\tfor _, headerName := range tc.validateHeaders {\n\t\t\t\toriginalValue, originalExists := originalHeaders[headerName]\n\t\t\t\tcapturedValue, capturedExists := capturedHeaders[headerName]\n\n\t\t\t\tif !originalExists {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Original header %s was not set\", headerName)\n\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif !capturedExists {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Captured header %s is missing\", headerName)\n\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif capturedValue != originalValue {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"%s header was modified during passthrough!\", headerName)\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Original length: %d\", len(originalValue))\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Captured length: %d\", len(capturedValue))\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Original:  %q\", originalValue)\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Captured: %q\", capturedValue)\n\n\t\t\t\t\t// Find the first difference\n\t\t\t\t\tminLen := len(originalValue)\n\t\t\t\t\tif len(capturedValue) < minLen {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tminLen = len(capturedValue)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < minLen; i++ {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif originalValue[i] != capturedValue[i] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"First difference at byte %d: original[%d]=%c (0x%02x), captured[%d]=%c (0x%02x)\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ti, i, originalValue[i], originalValue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ti, capturedValue[i], capturedValue[i])\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ %s preserved exactly (length: %d bytes)\", headerName, len(capturedValue))\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif allMatched {\n\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ All S3 headers passed through intact (byte-for-byte match)\")\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Some S3 headers were modified during passthrough\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tt.Log(\"\")\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"✓ S3-specific headers preservation test completed\")\n}\n\n// TestS3HeadersPreservationWithAuthorization tests that S3 headers are preserved\n// when sent alongside an Authorization header (realistic usage scenario).\nfunc TestS3HeadersPreservationWithAuthorization(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Create test   65536,\n\t}\n\n\tsrv, err := New(cfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create server: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\thandler := srv.Handler()\n\n\tt.Run(\"Complete SigV4 request with all S3 them\n\t\t\twrappedHandler := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\t\t// Capture all the S3 headers as ARMOR receives them\n\t\t\t\tfor _, headerName := range tc.validateHeaders {\n\t\t\t\t\tif value := r.Header.Get(headerName); value != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcapturedHeaders[headerName] = value\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\theadersCaptured = our wrapped handler\n\t\t\twrappedHandler.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\t\t\t// Verify we captured the S3 headers\n\t\t\tif !headersCaptured {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to capture S3 headers from request\")\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify each captured header matches the original exactly (byte-for-byte)\n\t\t\tallMatched := true\n\t\t\tfor _, headerName := range tc.validateHeaders {\n\t\t\t\toriginalValue, originalExists := originalHeaders[headerName]\n\t\t\t\tcapturedValue, capturedExists := capturedHeaders[headerName]\n\n\t\t\t\tif !originalExists {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Original header %s was not set\", headerName)\n\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif !capturedExists {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Captured header %s is missing\", headerName)\n\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif capturedValue != originalValue {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"%s header was modified during passthrough!\", headerName)\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Original length: %d\", len(originalValue))\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Captured length: %d\", len(capturedValue))\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Original:  %q\", originalValue)\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Captured: %q\", capturedValue)\n\n\t\t\t\t\t// Find the first difference\n\t\t\t\t\tminLen := len(originalValue)\n\t\t\t\t\tif len(capturedValue) < minLen {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tminLen = len(capturedValue)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < minLen; i++ {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif originalValue[i] != capturedValue[i] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"First difference at byte %d: original[%d]=%c (0x%02x), captured[%d]=%c (0x%02x)\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ti, i, originalValue[i], originalValue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ti, capturedValue[i], capturedValue[i])\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tallMatched = false\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ %s preserved exactly (length: %d bytes)\", headerName, len(capturedValue))\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif allMatched {\n\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ All S3 headers passed through intact (byte-for-byte match)\")\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Some S3 headers were modified during passthrough\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tt.Log(\"\")\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"✓ S3-specific headers preservation test completed\")\n}\n\n// TestS3HeadersPreservationWithAuthorization tests that S3 headers are preserved\n// when sent alongside an Authorization header (realistic usage scenario).\nfunc TestS3HeadersPreservationWithAuthorization(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Create test credentials\n\tcredentials := map[string]*config.Credential{\n\t\t\"TESTACCESSKEY\": {\n\t\t\tAccessKey: \"TESTACCESSKEY\",\n\t\t\tSecretKey: \"TESTSECRETKEY123456789012345678901234\",\n\t\t\tACLs:      nil,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tcfg := &config.Config{\n\t\tBucket:      \"test-bucket\",\n\t\tB2Region:    \"us-east-005\",\n\t\tCredentials: credentials,\n\t\tMEK:         make([]byte, 32),\n\t\tBlockSize:   65536,\n\t}\n\n\tsrv, err := New(cfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create server: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\thandler := srv.Handler()\n\n\tt.Run(\"Complete SigV4 request with all S3 headers\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t// Create a realistic SigV4 request with all components\n\t\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"GET\", \"/test-bucket/test-key\", nil)\n\n\t\t// Set Authorization
